name: Audit login security
acceptance_criteria: Ensure bcrypt hashing and HTTPS

name: Setup CI/CD pipeline
acceptance_criteria: Automated testing and deployment to staging on merge

name: Design database schema
acceptance_criteria: ERD finalized and approved by technical lead

name: Implement JWT authentication
acceptance_criteria: Tokens generated on login and validated on protected routes

name: Create user profile page
acceptance_criteria: Users can view and edit their name and email

name: Build password reset flow
acceptance_criteria: Secure token sent via email with a 15-minute expiration

name: Implement email service
acceptance_criteria: Integration with SMTP provider for transactional emails

name: Setup role-based access control
acceptance_criteria: Middleware verifies user role against endpoint requirements

name: Create project dashboard
acceptance_criteria: Displays list of active sprints and basic metrics

name: Build task creation modal
acceptance_criteria: Form validates inputs and saves to the database

name: Implement task assignment
acceptance_criteria: Users can be assigned to tasks from a dropdown list

name: Add drag-and-drop Kanban board
acceptance_criteria: Task status updates automatically when moved across columns

name: Integrate third-party OAuth
acceptance_criteria: Users can log in using their Google accounts

name: Write unit tests for auth module
acceptance_criteria: Minimum 80% code coverage on all authentication functions

name: Setup logging and monitoring
acceptance_criteria: Error logs are captured and sent to the centralized logging service

name: Optimize database queries
acceptance_criteria: No query on the main dashboard takes longer than 200ms

name: Create admin user management
acceptance_criteria: Admins can view, ban, and delete user accounts

name: Build activity feed
acceptance_criteria: System logs and displays history of changes on each task

name: Implement global search
acceptance_criteria: Search bar returns matching tasks, projects, and users

name: Design mobile-responsive navigation
acceptance_criteria: Sidebar collapses into a hamburger menu on screens under 768px
